data.status: awaiting alcohol license, on deck for an early summer opening
data.short_description: A father-son duo is opening a cocktail bar in the former Longshot space at 477 S. Main Street, Memphis. The 4,500 sq ft bar will blend dive bar accessibility with craft cocktail quality, also offering a limited food menu. Opening is pending alcohol license approval.
No article content available due to connection timeout.

KERO+ Homemade Bites Brazilian Café is preparing to open in the former Bocelli's space in Somerville's Winter Hill neighborhood. Co-owners Daniane Felicio and Júnior Garcia will serve homemade Brazilian favorites including coxinhas, pães de queijo, sandwiches, and Brazilian coffee. The storefront has been vacant for some time.

Brain Food Memphis is opening a second, downtown location at 121 Union Avenue as a more complete expression of the brand beyond its existing Cordova location. Owner Tredarious Hayes describes the downtown spot as offering a dedicated branded environment, dine-in atmosphere, and broader hospitality. No opening date has been announced.

A liquor license application was submitted for Mendocino Farms at 847 W Fulton Market, which would be the chain's third Chicago-area location. No opening date has been announced as the project is still in early development stages. A press release is expected in the coming weeks.

data.location: 5324 S John Young Pkwy, Orlando, FL 32839
data.short_description: Jack in the Box is returning to Florida with a new Orlando location at 5324 S. John Young Parkway, set to open in June 2026. Franchisee Ed Zausch entered a 10-restaurant deal with the chain in 2024, with this Orlando location part of that expansion. The brand had a significant Florida presence in the 1970s and 80s before withdrawing from the state.

data.location: 124 N Avondale Rd, Avondale Estates, GA 30002
data.short_description: Chef Kathryn Fitzgerald is opening Last Dance at 124 N. Avondale Rd in Avondale Estates, partnering with three other chefs as co-owners. The farm-to-table restaurant will focus on an upscale yet approachable dining environment, with signature items including liver eclair, lamb schnitzel, and whole fish. Brunch service is planned to roll out several weeks after opening.

data.status: preparing to open in the coming months
data.short_description: Twin brothers Gidi and Eitan Goldberg are preparing to open Low & Slow Southern Kitchen + Tap in downtown Amesbury, featuring Southern comfort food, smoked meats, and a speakeasy-style upstairs bourbon bar called the 1874 Bourbon Room. The restaurant is pending final construction timelines with a target of mid- to late June 2026.

data.status: will debut a new brick-and-mortar this year
data.short_description: Billy Bricks Pizza will open a new location in downtown Oswego at 5 S Madison Street, marking an expansion of the 20-year-old Neapolitan and ultra-thin pizza chain. The company has not announced an opening date as it is still determining when to break ground. This will be the first designated pizza restaurant in Oswego's downtown.

data.location: 4418 Monroe Rd, Suite A, Charlotte, NC 28205
data.status: Wilson hopes to open the storefront in May
data.short_description: Chef Mary Jayne Wilson is opening Thoughtful Baking Co.'s first brick-and-mortar location at 4418 Monroe Rd, Suite A in Charlotte's Oakhurst neighborhood, after five years operating at farmers markets. The 3,500 sq ft space will include a kitchen, storefront with pick-up window, and a back room for cooking classes. The space is currently undergoing cosmetic renovations.

Tipsy Scoop is opening Philadelphia's first "Barlour" in Rittenhouse Square this spring, in partnership with spirits retailer BOTLD. The boozy ice cream brand offers cocktail-inspired ice creams and sorbets infused with up to 5% ABV, alongside non-alcoholic options, with exclusive Philadelphia menu items planned.

Chef Giorgio Rapicavoli is opening Luca Steak, a 4,500 sq ft Italian steakhouse, at Wynwood Plaza at 95 NW 29th Street in Miami. The restaurant will also feature 2,000 sq ft of outdoor space adjacent to the building's public plaza. No exact opening date has been announced.

Sanguich, the Michelin Bib Gourmand–recognized Cuban sandwich restaurant, has signed a 10-year lease for a 1,350 sq ft shop at Wynwood Plaza in Miami. The new location is scheduled to open summer of 2026, joining other tenants at the mixed-use development.

Burger King's Whopper Bar at Universal's CityWalk is closing after 17 years, with its last day of service on April 21. Five Guys has been targeted to move into the space, with an expected opening of summer 2026, to be operated by Utah-based North Star Dining USA Inc.

Five Guys is set to move into the former Burger King Whopper Bar space at Universal's CityWalk, with an expected opening of summer 2026. The location will be operated by North Star Dining USA Inc., which owns more than 15 Five Guys locations in the Orlando market.

data.status: set to reopen this spring under new ownership
data.short_description: The Slip in Kirkland is set to reopen this spring under new owners Ricky and Maria Eng, after the former owner closed the restaurant in September 2025 due to health matters. The neighborhood staple, known for its waterfront patio, burgers, and craft cocktails, has been a Kirkland fixture for nearly three decades. The new owners also operate BeachHouse Bar + Grill in Kirkland.

data.status: slated to open the fourth quarter of 2027
data.short_description: SunLife Organics will open at JEM Private Residences at Miami Worldcenter, located at 1016 NE Second Avenue, when the luxury residential tower opens in Q4 2027. The wellness-focused smoothie and café brand will serve residents and visitors with a health-forward all-day menu. This will be SunLife's first South Florida location in Miami.

data.location: Address not specified (Minock Park Place development, intersection of Grand River Avenue and Minock Street, Detroit area)
data.event_date: End of July or August (year not specified)
data.status: will debut around the end of July or August
data.short_description: Calixto Mexican Grill is expanding from its Livonia location to the upcoming Minock Park Place development in the Grandmont-Rosedale area of Detroit. Owner Enrique Aquino plans to open the new location close to the development's opening, around late July or August, featuring a larger kitchen with a satellite kitchen program for aspiring chefs.

data.location: 2800 Southcenter Mall, Seattle, WA 98188 (Westfield Southcenter, Tukwila)
data.short_description: Eggslut is opening its second Washington location at Westfield Southcenter in Tukwila this spring, following the recent opening of its Seattle Capitol Hill location last fall. This location will expand the menu to include Wagyu burgers and rosemary fries beyond the standard Eggslut offerings.

Permit applications have been filed with the Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation for a Yonutz doughnut shop at 3140 West 84th Street, Unit 8 in Hialeah. No opening date has been announced. The shop will be operated by Rashid Elghoul and is part of the brand's growing South Florida presence.

Cleo, a neighborhood rotisserie restaurant from Three Top Hospitality, is opening at 621 Hudson Street in New York's West Village on April 17, 2026. The kitchen is led by Chef Juliana Latif, with a menu centered on 24-hour marinated rotisserie chicken with Mediterranean and Middle Eastern influences. The 34-seat space is designed for both quick dinners and relaxed meals.

Blank Street Coffee is set to open a flagship 2,900 sq ft location at 32 Sixth Ave in Tribeca, taking over a former Starbucks space. The location will feature the brand's signature coffees alongside a menu of matcha beverages. This large-format store marks a significant step for the chain, which launched as a mobile coffee cart in Brooklyn in 2020.

Pizzicata has recently opened at Citadelle Center in Glendale's Arrowhead Ranch area, offering authentic Italian dining with Neapolitan-style pizza, Roman pinsa, and fresh pastas. The restaurant was founded by Italian natives Federico Venturini and Chef Viola Tagliaferri. This marks the brand's newest expansion in Arizona.

Fit Mind Wellness has recently opened at Citadelle Center, offering mental health evaluation and counseling services for adults, children, teens, couples, and families. Specialties include marriage and relationship counseling, first responder evaluations, postpartum and pregnancy loss support, and EMDR therapy.

Estetika Beauty Clinic has recently opened at Citadelle Center in Glendale, adding to the center's beauty and wellness tenant mix. The article notes its addition strengthens the center's growing mix of wellness-oriented tenants but provides no further operational details.

data.location: 444 Park Ave S, New York, NY 10016
data.short_description: Golden Child, a rooftop bar from Renwick Hospitality Group, is now open above Hotel Park Ave NYC at 444 Park Avenue South in NoMad. The concept pairs Ivy League–inspired decor with a Modern American menu from Executive Chef Carsten Johannsen, featuring playful takes on nostalgic childhood dishes alongside cocktail-forward programming.

data.location: 21580 Market Pl Dr, New Caney, TX 77357
data.status: anticipates opening a couple of months after construction kicks off, in the winter of this year
data.short_description: Baskin-Robbins is opening a new 1,398 sq ft shop in the Valley Ranch Town Center in New Caney, operated by franchisee Gaurang Patel of The Tattva Group. Construction is expected to start in September and wrap up in September of the following year, though the franchisee anticipates opening in the winter of this year.

data.status: Phase 1 is slated to wrap up by August 2026
data.short_description: Handies Douzo, a Houston-based handroll and sushi concept, has signed a lease to open a 2,000 sq ft location at the new PAGEWOOD development at 1107 Hutchins Street in EaDo, marking the project's first new retail tenant. The restaurant is known for counter-style seating, omakase experiences, and signature dishes like otoro sashimi and ume masu crudos. Phase 1 of the development is slated to wrap up by August 2026.

data.status: hoping to soft open the cafe on April 30
data.short_description: Tous Les Jours is debuting a new West Michigan location at 5721 S Westnedge Avenue in Portage, with the owner and franchisee hoping to soft open on April 30. Construction is complete and the team is currently going through the hiring process. The bakery and café will offer baguettes, chocolate-dipped Belgian waffles, custard buns, honey cheese mochi pancakes, pastries, sandwiches, and cake flavors.

data.status: quietly reopened on April 7 under new ownership
data.short_description: Dirty Dan Harris Steakhouse has officially reopened under new ownership in Bellingham's Fairhaven Historic District, after closing in 2023 following a fire at the adjacent Terminal Building. New owners Steven Marandola and Heather Everett took over the nearly 50-year-old fine dining staple, with Marandola having previously worked there rising from dishwasher to manager.

Mister Q. Cafe is expanding from its original Charlestown location to a second outpost at 150 Western Ave in Cambridge, with a Google Business page listing a projected opening before the end of May 2026. The approximately 850 sq ft space will seat 14 guests indoors and 20 outside, with daily service planned from 8 a.m. to 10 p.m.

data.location: 5560 E Lake Mead Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89115
data.status: making the permanent move to the Valley
data.short_description: Mz. Chicks Wings and Things, a soulful mobile food trailer originally started in Minneapolis in 2024, is permanently relocating to Las Vegas and will operate out of the Trujillo Commissary at 5560 E Lake Mead Blvd. Owner Jacqueline McGill plans to serve different areas of Las Vegas and attend local events, with customers directed to social media for daily location updates.

data.store_name: Layne's Chicken Fingers (SW Military Dr location)
data.location: 742 SW Military Dr, San Antonio, TX (no zip code in article)
data.event_date: 2025 (this year, year not specified in article)
data.short_description: Layne's Chicken Fingers franchisee Eli Cohen is opening two locations in the Greater San Antonio region as part of a broader Texas expansion. The SW Military Drive corridor location at 742 SW Military Dr is expected to open this year, with the brand having already debuted in San Antonio via a separate franchisee in Seguin.

data.location: 1604 Marbach, San Antonio, TX (no zip code in article)
data.short_description: A second Layne's Chicken Fingers location from franchisee Eli Cohen is slated to open in 2027 on the Far West Side of San Antonio near Champions Park at 1604 Marbach. This is part of Cohen's broader multi-store development agreement across the Greater San Antonio area and Lubbock, Texas.

data.status: Levant BBQ should be serving up its hot and smoky eats by fall
data.short_description: Levant BBQ is opening a second location inside Sugar Land Town Square at 15903 City Walk, with construction on the 3,973 sq ft space expected to start in July and wrap up in September. If permitting and construction go as planned, the halal Texas BBQ and Levantine-fusion concept should be open by fall.

data.location: 5020 Carolina Forest Blvd, Myrtle Beach, SC 29579
data.short_description: South Coast Beer Project, a brewery-restaurant-venue concept operated by Chris Evans and Susan "Harry" Heryadi, is set to debut at 5020 Carolina Forest Blvd this spring. The approximately 9,000 sq ft interior and 25,000 sq ft outdoor space will feature a coastal theme, live music, a family area with a playground, and a video wall for sporting events.

data.location: 227 E Cevallos St, Suite 101, San Antonio, TX 78204
data.short_description: Purr-Fecto Cat Lounge, a cat-adoption café founded in South Austin in 2022, is planning to open in San Antonio's Southtown Lone Star District at 227 E Cevallos St, Suite 101. Construction is expected to start in June and wrap up by end of September, with the owner targeting a September opening. The café serves coffee and hosts events such as yoga and painting classes, while facilitating cat adoptions.

data.location: Address not specified (pop-up currently at 218 W Wilkins Street, Jackson, MI)
data.status: getting ready to debut her new book shop in Jackson later this year
data.short_description: Owner Samantha Horner is preparing to open Northern Skies Books, an independent bookstore offering dirty sodas, energy drinks, iced coffees, and lattes, in Jackson, Michigan. No opening date or permanent address has been announced; the concept will also host book clubs and community events alongside fantasy, romance, and BookTok book sales.

data.location: 4010 NE Fremont St, Suite B, Portland, OR 97212
data.short_description: Chin Cha, a bubble tea shop with existing locations in Lake Oswego and Cypress, TX, is preparing to open a new store at Northeast Fremont Street and Northeast 41st Avenue in Portland. Signage has been spotted at the location, and the business was registered with the state in May 2025 in the Suite B space. The owner was not immediately available to comment.

data.status: last day of service would be April 4
data.short_description: Libre, a popular dessert and cocktail bar at 2601 SE Clinton St in Portland, announced via Instagram that its last day of service was April 4. Liquor licensing documents have since been submitted by Libre 26 LLC for a new concept called Ring Ding Ding at the same address, though details have not yet been shared.

data.status: details still too soon to share
data.short_description: Liquor licensing documents have been submitted for Ring Ding Ding, a new concept planned for the former Libre space at 2601 SE Clinton St in Portland. No details about the concept have been released yet, with a representative indicating more information is expected in the coming weeks.

data.status: held its final performance on March 21
data.short_description: Hideout Coffee House and Theatre closed after a 26-year run on Congress Avenue, with its final performance on March 21. The space at 617 Congress Ave is set to be replaced by a new bar and coffee shop called The Archive.

data.status: liquor licensing documents submitted, details not yet revealed
data.short_description: The Archive is a new bar and coffee shop planned to open in the former Hideout Coffee House and Theatre space at 617 Congress Ave in Austin. Liquor licensing documents have been submitted and the project is moving forward, though the owner indicated details could not yet be revealed.

data.status: hoping to have us open by Labor Day
data.short_description: Ellianos Coffee is preparing to open its first St. Augustine location at 3465 US-1, Suite 101, with an interior buildout expected to start the month of the article's publication. Franchisee Mike Soares is targeting a Labor Day opening, and this location will be Ellianos' first end-cap café-style format, featuring a single-lane drive-thru and indoor seating.

A work permit was issued on April 9 for a new SoFresh healthy food franchise location at 75 Irondale Road, Suite 105 in Nocatee, joining the Marketplace at Nocatee retail center anchored by a Publix Super Market. This will be SoFresh's fourth Northeast Florida location, complementing existing spots in Durbin Park, Ortega Park, and a forthcoming St. Augustine location.

Plans have been submitted for a new Ellianos Coffee location at 8700 Beach Boulevard in Jacksonville, operated by The Harvest Venture Group, Inc., which would be the brand's 18th Northeast Florida location. The brand currently has 10 locations in operation in the area, with three more coming soon and five under review.

data.location: Multiple locations across PA and NJ (see description)
data.short_description: The Markham Team, led by CEO Adam Golomb, has acquired 10 existing Smoothie King locations across Pennsylvania and New Jersey and plans to continue expanding the brand. Locations include three in Philadelphia, one each in York, Whitehall, and Langhorne, PA, and four in New Jersey (Marlton, Delran, Clementon, Cherry Hill). The team is currently ensuring stores are in top condition.

Tokyo Swim Club, a retro Tokyo-inspired cocktail bar with izakaya-style dining including sushi, hand rolls, and yakitori, is opening in Ybor City at 1229 E Eighth Ave. The concept comes from the team behind Kōsen and Tanto, led by Director of Beverage and Sustainability Mike Western and Kōsen Executive Chef Andrew Huang.

data.event_date: First or second week of May (year not specified)
data.status: hoping to open the first or second week of May
data.short_description: Momentum Coffee is relocating its South Loop location from 2119 S State Street to 1900 S State Street, taking over a former Burger Point restaurant space. The move is driven by the expiration of the current lease, with the new spot serving the same customer base with brews, matchas, chai, and lunch items.

data.status: set to close, final meal on April 18
data.short_description: Crossroads Cafe in Acton is closing after a 38-year run, with its last day of service on April 18. Founded by Jay Manning, the community staple was known for American, Italian, and Mexican dishes including prime rib, shrimp scampi, and lobster rolls. The team announced the closure on social media, citing it was simply "time to move on."

Amorino Gelato is preparing to open a new location in St. Petersburg at 1246 Central Ave, with plan review paperwork recently submitted by St Pete Gelato LLC. Word of the opening first surfaced last summer when an opening was still expected for 2025, and the Amorino website now lists the location as "Coming Soon."

The Craic, an Irish-inspired gastropub, is opening in Charlotte's SouthPark neighborhood on April 15, 2026, in a 4,600 sq ft space seating 177 guests. The all-day concept will serve brunch, lunch, dinner, and late-night drinks daily from 11 a.m. to 2 a.m., with a comfort-food menu, live music, and a game room.

data.location: 225 Santa Monica Blvd, Santa Monica, CA 90401
data.status: closing at the end of the evening on Saturday, April 18th
data.short_description: The Misfit, a New American gastropub open for more than 15 years inside the historic Clock Tower Building in downtown Santa Monica, is closing on April 18 after operator LGO Hospitality opted not to renew the lease. CEO Bob Lynn stated the company is actively searching for a new location and plans to introduce a new concept.

data.location: 2627 S Sherwood Forest Blvd, Baton Rouge, LA 70816
data.status: set to become a brick-and-mortar restaurant later this month
data.short_description: Elisa's Cuban Coffee & Kitchen, a Baton Rouge food trailer under new ownership since July 2025, is converting to a brick-and-mortar restaurant at 2627 South Sherwood Forest Blvd. The 80-seat dining room in a former po-boy shop will offer a broader menu of traditional Cuban plates, a bar area, breakfast service, and a drive-thru window.

data.location: 4211 W Boy Scout Blvd, Suite 130, Tampa, FL 33607
data.short_description: Soni Cafe is opening at 4211 W Boy Scout Blvd, Suite 130 in Tampa's Corporate Center II at International Plaza, offering scratch-made breakfast, Boar's Head deli sandwiches, rotating daily hot lunch specials, and an Italian-style espresso coffee program. The 3,000 sq ft cafeteria-style space will feature upscale coffee and plenty of booth seating.

data.location: 4410 W Boy Scout Blvd, Tampa, FL 33607
data.short_description: The Sapphire Tampa, a supper club inspired by 1950s-era elegance, is opening at 4410 W Boy Scout Blvd this May, offering full-service dining with nightly live entertainment including live bands and DJs. The upscale menu will feature small plates, steaks, seafood, and crafted cocktails, with private dining suites available.

data.location: 99 W Paces Ferry Rd NW, Atlanta, GA 30305
data.short_description: Koshu Club, a Japanese Shōwa-era supper experience from Castellucci Hospitality Group and Chef J. Trent Harris, opened in Buckhead at 99 West Paces Ferry Road NW on April 14, 2026. The 45-seat restaurant blends traditional washoku and Western-influenced yoshoku cuisine, with dishes cooked via the sumibiyaki slow-grilling method and a deep sake list curated by two in-house sake sommeliers.

data.location: 9901 Chef Menteur Hwy, New Orleans, LA 70127
data.status: opening date pending final city permits
data.short_description: Pathway Café, a non-profit dual-purpose café and car wash founded by Brandon Hunter, is set to open at 9901 Chef Menteur Hwy in New Orleans East, taking over the long-vacant former Two Sisters 'N Da East building. The concept will serve po-boys, wings, bagels, and grits while providing stable employment for people in recovery and those reintegrating after incarceration. Interior renovations are currently underway pending final city permits.

Dolfy's, a Basque-inspired wood-fired restaurant from Chef Adolfo Garcia Jr. and partner Sophia Petrou Garcia, opened in March 2026 at 4508 Freret Street in New Orleans. The menu blends the Basque coast with Gulf coast ingredients, focusing on fresh seafood and open-fire cooking rooted in traditional Basque cuisine.

data.location: 6580 S Rainbow Blvd, Suite 102, Las Vegas, NV 89118
data.event_date: 2025 (this year, year not specified in article)
data.short_description: Braza Steak, an authentic Brazilian churrasco restaurant, is set to open at 6580 S Rainbow Blvd, Suite 102 in Las Vegas this year, confirmed by managing member Felipe Michiute Da Cruz. The casual concept will offer a pay-by-the-pound option for steak and other meats, alongside chicken and a salad bar, though no specific opening month has been announced.

data.location: 12325 Northlake Blvd, Suite 130, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33412
data.short_description: Smoke & Maple Gastropub is opening its first-ever location at Avenir Palm Beach Gardens at 12325 Northlake Blvd., Suite 130, with a late spring 2026 target. Co-founded by Nick Lanier and led by chef Dave Schroeder, the 167-seat gastropub will offer elevated food and cocktails, local beers, and a menu ranging from oysters to burgers with locally sourced ingredients.

Swig, a Utah-based dirty soda brand, is planning a corporate-owned location at the Birch House mixed-use development in Lawrenceville, Georgia. This will be the brand's first location in the Atlanta area, as the only existing Georgia location is in Fort Oglethorpe. Further details regarding the opening timeline remain unclear.

data.status: planning a new opening this summer
data.short_description: TQM Hospitality is opening Amasa Mexican Kitchen at City Center Alpharetta at 15 Academy St, Suite 1E this summer, as a sister restaurant to their Baja California-inspired Chichería Mexican Kitchen. The seafood-focused, gluten-free concept will feature a blue corn masa program, a tequila room with margarita flights, a Mexico City-inspired Sunday cazuela brunch buffet, and live entertainment in the evenings.

data.location: Address not specified (likely in the Belmont corridor, North Side, Chicago)
data.status: moving into a permanent space sometime this year
data.short_description: Unique Sweets, a Chicago-based baked goods business that employs autistic adults, is seeking a permanent brick-and-mortar café location, likely in the Belmont corridor on the North Side. No address or opening date has been announced; the team is still searching for a storefront, with plans to serve coffees, teas, light sandwiches, and pastries alongside their existing baked goods.

Jersey Diner & Restaurant is set to reopen at 3433 Harding Hwy on April 20, taking over the space of the former Malaga Diner, which closed in 2023, under new owner Yilmaz Kangal. The renovated dining room features new decor, and the expanded menu will include more breakfast, lunch, and dinner options along with Italian food, seafood, a bakery, and a salad bar.

The Thurman Cafe in German Village, Columbus, is temporarily closed following a significant electrical fire that started on April 12 in the back of the building. Owner Mike Suclescy is unsure of the reopening date due to the structural damage, which was described by the Columbus Division of Fire as "significant."
